mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(booking_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM biz_booking WHERE booking_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY booking_date ORDER BY booking_date ASC
SELECT r.room_number AS name, COUNT(b.booking_id) AS value FROM biz_booking b JOIN sys_room r ON b.room_id = r.room_id GROUP BY b.room_id ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT u.class_name AS name, COUNT(b.booking_id) AS value FROM biz_booking b JOIN sys_user u ON b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.role = 1 GROUP BY u.class_name
